segments.nethackrc:
OPTIONS=name:Kira,role:Monk,race:human,gender:female,align:neutral
OPTIONS=!autopickup,pushweapon,showexp,time,color,lit_corridor
OPTIONS=disclose:yi ya yv yg yc yo
OPTIONS=suppress_alert:3.3.1
OPTIONS=msg_window:reversed

steps.screen:
[15CIt is written in the Book of Chih Sung-tzu:

[19CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[19Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[19CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[19Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[19Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[19CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[15CYour god Chih Sung-tzu seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[15Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[15CYou, a newly trained Candidate, have been heralded
[15Cfrom birth as the instrument of Chih Sung-tzu.  You are destined
[15Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[15Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[15Cof us all:  Go bravely with Chih Sung-tzu!
[15C--More--




Kira the Candidate[13CSt:14 Dx:16 Co:13 In:8 Wi:15 Ch:9 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:14(14) Pw:5(5) AC:0 Xp:1/0 T:1

Hello Kira, welcome to NetHack!  You are a neutral female human Monk.--More--
